title: Messerschmidia

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Messerschmidia include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Messerschmidia is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in the form of capsules and tablets.
